_comment: Committed retrieval-quality floors for the offline frozen-embeddings CI gate (tests/test_eval_frozen.py). Measured by app.eval.retrieval_eval.evaluate over the ANSWERABLE golden_public items, ranked by the frozen bge-m3 vectors (make_frozen_retriever). Each floor sits ~0.05 below the measured value to absorb cross-platform numpy tie-flips. Re-measure and raise these only when the committed corpus/golden/frozen vectors change.
